chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 430 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2371/2025. 2. For orders on office No.22. 3. For orders on CMA No.2372/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 04.02.2025 Mr. Waqas, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2 to 4. Admittedly statutory recourse is available in respect of the impugned order, hence, direct recourse to writ jurisdiction cannot be justified. Petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
